report_purpose: Machine-readable technical design extraction for downstream agent. Values are extracted from the PDF object layer plus rendered-page review; not inferred from editable PowerPoint source.

precision_statement.coordinates: Object-layer bounding boxes rounded to 0.001 pt.
precision_statement.text_lengths: Unicode Python len() of extracted text strings, including spaces/punctuation; does not include line breaks unless present in a span.
precision_statement.colors: Text/vector colors from PDF instructions; image colors are not decomposed except sampled page palette.
precision_statement.important_limitation: Many cards, icons, photo captions, backgrounds, and some small texts are flattened into raster images. These are listed as image elements but their internal sub-elements do not have separate PDF coordinates.
